ES1! · CME · RTH PLAN · JUN 11, 2026 · UPDATED 05:34 ET (PRE-OPEN)

ES RTH Trading Plan — Updated for Overnight Action

Charts: 30-min RTH+ETH (05:31) · Market Profile with ON levels (05:34) · prior plan baseline 7,257.50 settle
Last 7,331.75 (+53.25 / +0.73% ON)
ON range 7,232.25 → 7,337.75 (+105.5)
ON POC 7,305.00 · ON VAH 7,316.25 · ON VAL 7,255.75
Y-value: VAH 7,367.75 / VAL 7,295.50
Price INSIDE Y-value, above ON VAH
ON inventory ~100% net long
▲ What changed overnight (vs last night's plan) The E4/R4 squeeze scenario fired: from a marginal new low probe, ES V-reversed off the lvn/low band (7,237.50 / 7,232.25), reclaimed the spike base (now marked 7,258.25), tore straight through the 7,287–7,299 wall and the speed zone, and is trading 7,331.75 — back inside yesterday's value (YVAL 7,295.50 reclaimed) and right at yesterday's VPOC zone. New chart annotations since last night: fib extensions 7,350.00 and 7,394.00, lvn 7,237.50, lvn 7,164.00, green zone extended at 7,396.50–7,410. The bear "sell-every-rally" template is suspended; today opens as a responsive, two-sided auction inside value with long overnight inventory.

01Top-Down — re-based at 7,331.75

a) Daily context (unchanged structure, new location)

ReferenceValueDistanceStatus
20-EMA (est., falling)≈7,415–7,420−85±Overhead confluent with 7,424.50 line + green zone 7,396.50–7,410
50-EMA≈7,286–7,288+44RECLAIMED overnight — now first support confluence with YVAL 7,295.50
100-EMA≈7,136+196Holding untested magnet only if 7,232 fails again
ATR102—ON already used ~105 pts of range before the bell — expect rotational digestion or a stretched (1.5× ATR) day, nothing in between

Read: Overnight produced a textbook failed-breakdown reversal at the lows (the R3 template, executed in Globex). Daily candle so far is a potential bullish engulf-from-below of yesterday's close — but it was built on overnight volume against a falling 20-EMA. Corrective-bear intermediate trend is wounded, not reversed, until the tape accepts above YVAH 7,367.75.

b) 30-Min — overnight flow & current drawn levels

c) Market Profile — overnight session detail

MetricValueRead
Y (Jun 10 RTH) valueVAH 7,367.75 · VAL 7,295.50Price has re-entered and is holding the lower-middle of yesterday's value → 80% rule risk toward YVAH
ON VAH / POC / VAL7,316.25 / 7,305.00 / 7,255.75Overnight built a clear distribution 7,256–7,316 with POC 7,305; price now ABOVE the whole ON value — stretched vs ON
ON low / structure7,232.25 with single-print buying tail ≈7,232–7,250Red TPO tail = aggressive responsive buying; thin = fast zone if revisited
ON high prints≈7,330–7,337 single prints (fresh)Current acceptance attempt; unbacked until RTH confirms
Open projection~7,316–7,340Open inside Y-value, above ON value → balanced-to-responsive template, NOT the gap-down trend template from last night's plan
UPDATED STRUCTURE MAP 7,396.50–7,410 ── green zone + fib 7,394 ◄ heavy supply 7,385.25 ── cyan MA 7,367.75 ── YVAH / 7,366.25 teal ◄ value ceiling 7,350.00 ── fib extend (NEW) ◄ first overhead test 7,331.75 ◄◄ YOU ARE HERE (green zone 7,318–28 below) 7,316.25 ── ON VAH 7,305.00 ── ON POC ◄ overnight gravity 7,299.25 / 7,295.50 ── pivot + YVAL ◄ bull/bear line (was "the wall") 7,287.00 ── 50-EMA zone 7,275–80 ── lt-cyan band 7,258.25 / 7,255.75 ── spike base + ON VAL 7,237.50 ── lvn (thin) 7,232.25 ── ON low + buying tail ▼ void → 7,206 / 7,203.75

Profile narrative: The overnight session repaired everything the Jun 10 trend day left behind: the poor-low scar was bought through, the speed zone filled, and value re-entry was achieved. The auction is now mid-composite: ON value (7,256–7,316) below, yesterday's upper distribution (7,335–7,368) above. The unfinished business has flipped — it's now the gap between current price and YVAH 7,367.75 above, and the thin lvn 7,237.50 / buying tail below. ON inventory is maximally long, which historically produces an early-RTH inventory correction toward the ON POC before the day's real auction begins.

VIX note: no updated VIX chart attached — last read 21.60 rising. If VX1 opens back under ~21, it confirms the repair; above 22 while ES holds 7,300+ is a divergence to respect.

⚑ Today's three controlling clusters 7,295.50–7,299.25 (YVAL/old wall — now support) · 7,366.25–7,367.75 (YVAH ceiling) · 7,394–7,410 (fib + supply zone). The whole RTH session is the auction between the first two; the third only matters on an acceptance day.

DimensionReadingImplication

04What-If Scenarios — RTH Jun 11 (updated)

U1 · Inventory Correction → Responsive Buy at ON POCBULL after dip★★★★ 30%
Open / contextOpens 7,320–7,340; early sellers correct the long ON inventory down through ON VAH 7,316.25 into ON POC 7,305 / YVAL shelf.
NarrativeDip is bought at 7,296–7,308 (ON POC + YVAL + 7,299.25); value builds inside yesterday's range; afternoon rotation tests 7,350 then YVAH 7,367.75 (80% rule).
SetupLong 7,304–7,308 on slowdown at ON POC · Stop 7,292 (under YVAL) · T1 7,331 (+25) · T2 7,350 (+44) · T3 7,366–7,368 (+60) · R:R 1.8→4.3
Confirm / invalidConfirm: first 30-min holds above 7,295.50. Invalid: 30-min close < 7,295.50 → flip to U4.
U2 · Responsive Fade at the 7,350 FibBEAR rotation★★★ 22%
Open / contextOpen-drive up tags fib extend 7,350 (or stalls 7,350–7,366) with weakening internals — ON longs take profit into strength.
NarrativeResponsive sellers at the fib + YVAH approach rotate price back through the fresh single prints (7,330s fill fast) to ON VAH 7,316 → ON POC 7,305.
SetupShort 7,349–7,352 on rejection (or 7,366–7,368 at YVAH) · Stop 7,358 (/7,376 for YVAH entry) · T1 7,331 (+19) · T2 7,316 (+34) · T3 7,305 (+45) · R:R 2.1→5.0
Confirm / invalidConfirm: failure to hold 7,344+ after the tag. Invalid: 30-min acceptance > 7,352 → step aside for U3.
U3 · Value Repair Day — Acceptance Over 7,350 → YVAH → Supply ZoneBULL trend★★★ 18%
Open / contextBuyers hold every dip above 7,316; 30-min acceptance above the 7,350 fib.
Narrative80% rule completes: rotation through YVAH 7,367.75, cyan 7,385.25, into the fib 7,394 / 7,396.50–7,410 supply zone — where day-one repair rallies typically terminate (falling 20-EMA just above).
SetupLong 7,352–7,355 on acceptance retest · Stop 7,341 · T1 7,367 (+13) · T2 7,385 (+31) · T3 7,394–7,406 (+45) · R:R 1.1→3.8
Confirm / invalidConfirm: two 30-min closes > 7,350 + VIX < 21. Invalid: back under 7,344.
U4 · YVAL Failure — Back Below the Old WallBEAR re-flip★★ 15%
Open / contextInventory correction doesn't stop at ON POC; 30-min close below YVAL 7,295.50 / 7,287.
NarrativeOvernight rally exposed as short-covering only. Price falls out of value again → lt-cyan 7,275–80 → ON VAL/spike base 7,256–7,258. The whole bear template from last night re-activates.
SetupShort 7,292–7,294 on the failed retest of 7,295.50 from below · Stop 7,303 · T1 7,276 (+17) · T2 7,258 (+35) · T3 7,237.50 lvn (+55) · R:R 1.7→5.0
Confirm / invalidConfirm: ON POC 7,305 acts as resistance after the break. Invalid: reclaim of 7,305.
U5 · Full Round-Trip — ON Rally LiquidatedBEAR tail★★ 10%
Open / contextU4 extends: ON VAL/spike base 7,255.75–7,258.25 fails intraday.
NarrativeTrapped ON longs liquidate through the thin lvn 7,237.50 to retest 7,232.25; a break there re-opens the void → 7,206/7,203.75, and day-3 trend-down risk returns (7,179 → lvn 7,164 → 7,136/100-EMA roadmap).
SetupShort 7,253 on loss of 7,255.75 · Stop 7,264 · T1 7,237.50 (+15) · T2 7,232 then assess (+21) · T3 7,206 (+47) · R:R 1.4→4.3
Confirm / invalidConfirm: VIX > 22.6. Invalid: reclaim 7,262. Respect the buying tail — scale T2 aggressively unless 7,232 snaps.
U6 · Gap-and-Go Trend Up Through EverythingBULL outlier★ 5%
Open / contextOpens strong and never corrects; YVAH taken in the IB.
NarrativeShort squeeze day-2: through 7,385/7,394–7,410 toward 7,424.50 (20-EMA) and 7,448.50. Requires VIX collapse < 20.
SetupOnly buy pullbacks that hold 7,367 from above · Stop 7,356 · T1 7,394 · T2 7,406 · T3 7,424 · R:R 2.5→5.0
Confirm / invalidConfirm: IB close > YVAH on expanding volume. Invalid: re-entry into value (< 7,364).

05Probability Matrix — updated

RankScenarioDirectionProb★
1U1 Inventory dip → responsive buy at ON POC/YVALBull30%★★★★
2U2 Fade at fib 7,350 / YVAH approachBear-rotation22%★★★

4U4 YVAL failure → 7,275 → 7,256Bear15%★★
5U5 Full round-trip < 7,255.75 → 7,232/voidBear10%★★
6U6 Gap-and-go > YVAH earlyBull5%★
CombinedBull 53%Bear 47%
Base case (updated)Early inventory correction into 7,296–7,308 (ON POC + YVAL + old wall) that gets bought, then a grinding rotation up to 7,350, with the day's decision at the YVAH 7,366–7,368 ceiling. Reasoning: open inside value + long ON inventory = correct first, auction second; the 80% rule and the trapped-short fuel argue for the upside test, while the falling 20-EMA and intermediate downtrend argue against acceptance beyond 7,394–7,410 on day one. Net: responsive day, buy the first dip, fade the value edges.

RTH OPEN ~7,330 (inside Y-value · above ON value · ON inventory LONG)
│
├─► FIRST MOVE DOWN (inventory correction — most likely first hour)
│     ├─ holds 7,305 ON POC / 7,296 YVAL
│     │     └─ U1 LONG → 7,331 → 7,350 → YVAH 7,367.75
│     │            ├─ YVAH rejects → late fade back to 7,335/7,316

Position size vs ATR — applies to all threeON already consumed ~105 pts (1× ATR). Expect compressed RTH range OR an outlier — run 60–70% size, take T1s faster than usual, and avoid mid-range entries between 7,316 and 7,344 (no-man's land between ON value and the fib).

09Structural Warnings — updated

⚠ Long overnight inventoryThe +105-pt ON rally means nearly everyone holding from Globex is long. The statistically favored first RTH move is a correction toward ON POC 7,305 — do not chase the open higher, and don't read the first dip as bear-template confirmation.
⚠ Fresh single prints 7,330–7,337 (pre-open)Current price sits on unbacked overnight prints. If RTH opens and rejects, these refill instantly — that's the U2 fade fuel. Treat 7,316–7,344 as a no-initiate zone until the open auction resolves.
⚠ lvn 7,237.50 + buying tail 7,232–7,250Thin low-volume node directly above a strong responsive-buy tail. Shorts into this band face violent bounce risk (two failed breakdowns in 24h already) — scale, don't hold full size through it.
⚠ Fib extensions 7,350 / 7,394 (new annotations)7,350 capped the entire overnight; 7,394 stacks with 7,396.50 and the green supply zone 7,396.50–7,410, under the falling 20-EMA (~7,415–7,425). First touches of both are fade-first levels in a corrective tape.
⚠ YVAL 7,295.50 — the polarity lineEverything above it = repair/balance regime (buy dips). One 30-min close below it and yesterday's entire bear template re-activates with targets 7,256 → 7,237 → 7,232 → void. Don't average a U1 long through it.
ℹ No updated VIX chartPlan assumes VX1 cooling from 21.6. Verify at the open: VIX < 21 validates the responsive-buy template; VIX > 22 while ES is above 7,300 is a divergence — cut size.

10Session Transition Table

If price at zone at the RTH open / IBImplicationLikely day type
> 7,367.75 (above YVAH)Value fully repaired in the IB; squeeze regimeTrend-up toward 7,394–7,410 / 7,424; P-shape
7,344–7,367 (fib→YVAH band)Strong open; decision at the ceilingNormal-variation up; fade YVAH first touch, buy acceptance
7,316–7,344 (current band)Open-auction-in-range; ON prints unconfirmedRotational/balance 7,305–7,368; let the IB pick the edge
7,295.50–7,316 (ON value)Inventory correction in progressU1 dip-buy day if YVAL holds; b-shape if it merely stalls
7,256–7,295 (below YVAL)Out of value again — repair failedNormal-variation down → ON VAL test; bear template re-armed
< 7,255.75Round-trip liquidationTrend-down attempt: 7,237 → 7,232 → void 7,206; day-3 downtrend

11Final Summary — RTH Jun 11 (updated 05:34 ET)

ItemCall
Macro biasBULL — rising 100/200/300-EMA stack intact
Intermediate biasCORRECTIVE / repairing — below falling 20-EMA, but 50-EMA and Y-value reclaimed overnight
Intraday biasNEUTRAL-BULL — buy the first dip, fade the value edges
Base caseInventory correction to 7,296–7,308 bought → rotation to 7,350 → decision at YVAH 7,366–7,368
Primary tradeLong 7,304–7,308 (ON POC/YVAL hold), stop 7,292, targets 7,331 / 7,350 / 7,366–7,368 (U1)
Secondary tradeShort 7,349–7,352 or 7,366–7,368 on first-touch rejection (U2), stop 7,358/7,376, targets 7,331 / 7,316 / 7,305
Key bull level7,350 fib (unlock) → 7,367.75 YVAH (confirm) → 7,394–7,410 (target/supply)
Key bear level7,295.50 YVAL — close below re-arms the bear template → 7,256 → 7,237.50 → 7,232 → void 7,206
Biggest riskChop in the unconfirmed 7,316–7,344 single-print band trapping both sides before the real auction picks a value edge
Day-type expectationRotational/inside-value (≈50%) · normal-variation up through YVAH (≈23%) · normal-variation/trend down on YVAL loss (≈25%) · gap-and-go (≈2%)
ES RTH Plan · UPDATED Jun 11, 2026 05:34 ET from overnight 30-min + TPO charts · Last 7,331.75 · ON: L 7,232.25 / H 7,337.75 / POC 7,305 / VAH 7,316.25 / VAL 7,255.75 · Y-value 7,295.50–7,367.75 · For planning purposes — not financial advice. Verify VIX and final ON extremes at the bell.
